text:
const uniqueTags = [
    ...Object.values(options.renderer.alias || {}),
    ...new Set(tags),
    ...new Set(usedComponents),
  ]
    .map(tag => getMappedTag(tag, options?.renderer?.alias))
    .filter(tag => !htmlTags.has(kebabCase(tag)))
    .map(tag => pascalCase(tag))

const titleRegex = wantTitleSnippet
    ? new RegExp(`(${terms.map(t => t.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&')).join('|')})`, 'gi')
    : null

fontsParsed.push(...head.link
      .filter(link => isValidURL(String(link.href)))
      .map(link => parse(String(link.href))),
    )

addServerImports([
  { name: 'useTranslation', from: '@intlify/h3' },
  ...h3UtilsExports.map(name => ({ name, from: '@intlify/utils/h3' })),
])

return () => [
  h(Comment, `${__SWITCH_LOCALE_PATH_LINK_IDENTIFIER__}-[${props.locale}]`),
  h(SlpComponent, { ...attrs, ...props }, slots.default),
  h(Comment, `/${__SWITCH_LOCALE_PATH_LINK_IDENTIFIER__}`),
]

return vnodes
    .flatMap(vnode => _flatUnwrap(unwrap(vnode, [tags[0]!]), tags.slice(1)))
    .filter(vnode => !(isText(vnode) && nodeTextContent(vnode).trim() === ''))
